description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a boxy silhouette and clean lines. The sofa is upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric that covers both the seat and backrest, as well as the armrests. The armrests are straight, thick, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform rectangular profile. The seat and back cushions appear to be integrated and are of uniform thickness, providing a streamlined look without visible separations or tufting. The base of the sofa is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs or underframe. Its overall appearance is understated and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A compact, boxy two-seater sofa with straight armrests and smooth light gray upholstery, featuring integrated seat and back cushions and a solid base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, straight armrests, and the uniform seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and the solid, continuous base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, uniform seat and back cushions, both attached and integrated into the sofa frame, with no visible separations or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is solid and extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a block-style support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with an integrated cushion, matching the seat in thickness and style, and no visible segmentation or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
